name: Cycling Spring Classics 2026
notes: UCI WorldTour Spring Classics season. Norwegian team Uno-X Mobility features several riders in the Spring Classics. Eurosport/Discovery+ hold broad rights in Norway; NRK typically covers Milan-San Remo and major monuments. Start times are approximate (UTC) — discovery loop should verify exact start times from UCI or Eurosport. Key Norwegian riders: Jonas Abrahamsen (Uno-X Mobility), Sven Erik Bystrøm (UAE Team Emirates), Søren Wærenskjold (Uno-X Mobility), Andreas Leknessund (Tudor Pro Cycling).
